mapping.description: List of touchpoint-to-screen routing rules that determine which screen configuration to display. The app iterates these entries, matching the runtime touchpoint and subscription status via StatusBasedTouchPointResolver to select a screen from the 'screens' array. Adding, removing, or reordering entries changes which screen variant users see for a given entry point.

subscription_status.description: A single subscription-status string that is merged with 'subscription_statuses' into one list for status-based filtering. Accepted values: strings in the format "{tierType_lowercase}" or "{tierType_lowercase}_in_trial" (e.g. "gold", "gold_in_trial"); an empty or absent value is ignored. Changing this narrows or broadens which subscription states are eligible to see the mapped screen.

screen.description: References a screen configuration by matching it to a 'screen_name' value in the 'screens' array. Accepted values: any string that equals one of the screen_name values. Changing this value switches which screen layout appears when this mapping is resolved; a value that matches no screen_name results in no screen being shown.

subscription_statuses.description: Array of subscription-status strings combined with 'subscription_status' into one list for filtering. Accepted values: strings in the format "{tierType_lowercase}" or "{tierType_lowercase}_in_trial"; a null or empty list means the mapping matches regardless of subscription state. Changing these values controls which subscription tiers and trial states are eligible to see this screen variant.

touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier matched against the runtime touchpoint string passed from the calling screen. Accepted values: any string; the resolver also recognises the special value "default" as a fallback when no exact match is found. Changing this value determines which navigation entry points (e.g. editor, profile) trigger this mapping.

enabled.description: Controls whether this touchpoint mapping is active. Accepted values: true (default when absent, via orTrue()) or false. When set to false and the touchpoint matches, the payment reminder bottom sheet is suppressed entirely — no screen is displayed and the resolver returns null.

screens.description: Array of screen configurations for the payment reminder bottom sheet dialog. Exactly one screen is selected at runtime based on its screen_name matching the resolved mapping's 'screen' value. Adding or removing entries changes the available screen variants; at least one must match a mapping for the dialog to appear.

selected_data.description: Screen content that replaces the initial_data visuals after the user taps the main action button. Once applied, the skip button becomes semi-transparent and non-clickable, a checkmark icon appears on the main button, and the dialog auto-dismisses after 2500 ms. Omitting this object means no visual transition occurs after the button tap.

button.description: Configuration for the main action button in the selected (post-tap) state. Only the title text is applied from this object; the button retains the background color set by initial_data.

background_color.description: Mapped into the data model but not applied to the UI during the selected-data state — the button retains the background color from initial_data. Accepted values: Cascade design-token path strings. Changing it has no visible effect in the current code.

title.description: Text configuration for the main button label in the selected state. Only the 'text' child is consumed; 'color' is mapped but not applied to the button.

color.description: Mapped into the data model but not applied to the button UI — the button color is controlled by background_color via ButtonType.FILLED. Accepted values: Cascade design-token path strings. Changing it has no visible effect in the current code.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Label displayed on the main action button after the user taps it in the initial state. Accepted values: any string; empty or null is treated as empty string. Changing it updates the confirmation button text the user sees briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text block displayed below the title in the selected (post-tap) state. Shown in the titleDescView TextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback. Due to a code issue, when subtitle text is non-empty the subtitle TextView's color is overwritten with the description's resolved color instead. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it has limited visible effect because it is overridden by description.color when text is present.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the subtitle area (titleDescView) in the selected state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the subtitle copy shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

banner.description: Media banner displayed in a MediaView within the bottom sheet in the selected (post-tap) state. Replaces the initial_data banner when the main button is tapped.

type.description: Determines the media rendering mode in the MediaView. Accepted values: "image", "video", "gif", "lottie", "reviews" (deserialized via BannerTypeModel enum; falls back to IMAGE if null). When set to "lottie", looping is explicitly disabled. Changing this switches the rendering strategy for the banner area.

url.description: URL of the media resource loaded into the MediaView. Accepted values: any valid URL string (empty string used as fallback if null). Changing it updates the banner image, animation, or video displayed in the selected state.

description.description: Description text block displayed below the subtitle in the selected (post-tap) state. Rendered in the descView TextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback, applied as text color to the description view. Also inadvertently applied to the subtitle view when subtitle text is non-empty. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the description text color and, due to a code issue, the subtitle text color as well.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the description area (descView) in the selected state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the description copy shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

title.description: Title text block displayed at the top of the bottom sheet in the selected (post-tap) state. Rendered in the titleTextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback, applied as text color to the title view. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the title text color in the selected state.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the title area (titleTextView) in the selected state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the title heading shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

screen_name.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration, matched against the 'screen' field in touchpoint mappings to select this layout. Accepted values: any string that a mapping's 'screen' field references. Changing or renaming it will break the link to existing mappings unless those mappings are also updated.

initial_data.description: Screen content displayed when the payment reminder bottom sheet first opens. Contains the title, subtitle, description, banner, and action button shown in the initial state before any user interaction.

button.description: Configuration for the main action button shown in the initial state. Rendered as a FILLED button at XL control size. Tapping it transitions the dialog to the selected_data state.

background_color.description: Cascade design-token path used to set the filled button's background color via getColorOrPackageBy() with PrimaryColors as fallback. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the main button's background color in both initial and selected states (the selected state retains this color).

title.description: Text configuration for the main button label. Only the 'text' child is applied to the button; 'color' is mapped but not used in the UI.

color.description: Mapped into the data model but not applied to the button UI — the button text color is determined by ButtonType.FILLED styling. Accepted values: Cascade design-token path strings. Changing it has no visible effect in the current code.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Label displayed on the main action button in the initial state. Accepted values: any string; null is treated as empty string. Changing it updates the call-to-action text on the primary button of the payment reminder dialog.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text block displayed below the title in the initial state. Shown in the titleDescView TextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback. Due to a code issue, when subtitle text is non-empty the subtitle TextView's color is overwritten with the description's resolved color instead. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it has limited visible effect because it is overridden by description.color when text is present.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the subtitle area (titleDescView) in the initial state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the subtitle copy below the title when the dialog first opens.

banner.description: Media banner displayed in a MediaView at the top of the bottom sheet in the initial state. Supports multiple media formats including static images, videos, GIFs, and Lottie animations.

type.description: Determines the media rendering mode in the MediaView. Accepted values: "image", "video", "gif", "lottie", "reviews" (deserialized via BannerTypeModel enum; falls back to IMAGE if null). When set to "lottie", looping is explicitly disabled (plays once). Changing this switches the rendering strategy for the banner area.

url.description: URL of the media resource loaded into the MediaView. Accepted values: any valid URL string (empty string used as fallback if null). Changing it updates the banner image, animation, or video displayed when the dialog first opens.

description.description: Description text block displayed below the subtitle in the initial state. Rendered in the descView TextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback, applied as text color to the description view. Also inadvertently applied to the subtitle view when subtitle text is non-empty. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the description text color and, due to a code issue, the subtitle text color as well.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the description area (descView) in the initial state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the descriptive body text shown when the dialog first opens.

title.description: Title text block displayed at the top of the bottom sheet content in the initial state. Rendered in the titleTextView, visible only when text is non-empty.

color.description: Cascade design-token path resolved via getColorOrPackageBy() with TextColors.base as fallback, applied as text color to the title view. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the title heading color when the dialog first opens.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: Text displayed in the title area (titleTextView) in the initial state. Accepted values: any string; if non-empty the view becomes visible. Changing it updates the main heading shown when the payment reminder dialog first opens.

skip_button.description: Configuration for the secondary skip/dismiss button at the bottom of the payment reminder dialog. Tapping it dismisses the dialog and fires a monetization_button_click analytics event with button_type 'close'. After the main button is tapped, this button becomes semi-transparent (alpha 0.4) and non-clickable.

color.description: Cascade design-token path used to set the skip button's text color via getColorOrPackageBy() with PrimaryColors as fallback. Accepted values: Cascade color token path strings. Changing it alters the skip button text color.

text.description: Label displayed on the skip button. Accepted values: any string; null results in no visible text. Changing it updates the dismiss/skip call-to-action text shown below the main button.

tree.role: Bottom sheet dialog fragment that displays the payment reminder UI with banner, title, description, and action buttons.

children.role: ViewModel that fetches payment reminder screen data and exposes it as a StateFlow to the fragment.
Implementation that delegates to the repo to get payment reminder screen data and check if the flow is enabled.
Interface defining the contract for checking if the payment reminder flow is enabled.
Repository that fetches PaymentReminderApiModel from RemoteSettings and resolves the correct screen via SubscriptionOfferServiceNew.
Maps PaymentReminderScreens API model to PaymentReminderScreenEntity domain model.
API model representing a banner with type (BannerTypeModel) and URL fields.
FeatureStart API model deserialized from remote settings key 'payment_reminder_screen', containing touchpoints and screen configurations.
Data class mapping touchpoint names to screen names with enable/disable and subscription status filters.
Interface that provides a screenName property used to match screens from touchpoint mappings.
API model for text configuration with text, color, and newField properties.
Interface for resolving the correct offer screen from touchpoints and screen lists.
Implementation that resolves offer screens by matching touchpoints and subscription statuses.
Domain entity representing the payment reminder screen with skip button, initial data, and selected data states.
ViewModel that tracks monetization analytics events including screen opens and button clicks.
Data class holding core analytics parameters: source, sourceSid, subSid, screenType, status.
Serializable params passed to the fragment containing analytics params, thank-you popup ID, and offer screen configuration.
Serializable data class containing all subscription analytics tracking parameters like source, touchPoint, subSid, etc.
Koin DI module that wires PaymentReminderScreenMapper, RepoImpl, UseCaseImpl, and ViewModel.
